signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: USDT-premie in India stijgt naar 8.5% na crackdown stablecoin
signals.summary: India's USDT premium topped 8.5% after Enforcement Directorate raids on Bengaluru crypto firms reportedly disrupted stablecoin supply.

signals.title: Nieuwe MiCA-regelgeving in Europa en Amerikaanse arbeidsmarktgegevens volgende week
signals.summary: New MiCA regime in Europe, U.S. jobs report for June: Crypto Week Ahead

signals.title: BIS waarschuwt: stablecoins gedragen zich meer als ETF's dan geld
signals.summary: BIS warns stablecoins are more like ETFs than actual money, and they're creating FX risk

signals.title: BIS: stablecoins voldoen niet aan geldkenmerken, waarschuwt voor risico's
signals.summary: The Bank for International Settlements argued in its annual report that stablecoins still fall short of money on singleness, elasticity and integrity.

signals.title: BIS waarschuwt dat stablecoins wereldfinancier kunnen fragmenteren
signals.summary: The Basel-based institution said that private digital tokens fall short of the requirements for sound money and urged policymakers to accelerate work on tokenized forms of central bank and commercial bank money.

signals.title: Binance registreert wekelijkse uitgangen van meer dan 400 miljoen dollar voor MiCA-deadline
signals.summary: Early exchange flow data show no clear signs of a mass migration from Binance ahead of the EU MiCA transition deadline, despite rivals' efforts to attract users.

signals.title: OpenPayd ontvangt MiCA-licentie voor crypto-diensten in Europa
signals.summary: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.
